pattern: Image' is an ambiguous reference between 'System\.Drawing\.Image' and 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Image'
fix_guidance: Fully qualify the Image type (e.g., System.Drawing.Image) or create a using alias to disambiguate the conflicting types.

pattern: JpegDevice' does not contain a definition for '(Quality|Save)'
fix_guidance: Use the JpegDevice constructor to set resolution and quality (e.g., new JpegDevice(new Resolution(150), 90)) and call its Process(page, stream) method instead of Save; it does not implement IDisposable, so avoid a using block.

pattern: ConvertErrorAction' does not contain a definition for 'Convert'
fix_guidance: Use a valid enum member such as ConvertErrorAction.Delete or upgrade to a newer Aspose.PDF version where ConvertErrorAction.Convert exists, optionally guarding the call with conditional compilation.

pattern: Document' does not contain a definition for 'BindXslFo'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent BindXslFo call with the Document constructor that accepts an XSL‑FO file (e.g., new Document(xslFoPath, new XslFoLoadOptions())) and ensure the Aspose.Pdf assembly is referenced.

pattern: ^'EpubSaveOptions' does not contain a definition for 'CoverImageFilePath'$
fix_guidance: Remove the nonexistent CoverImageFilePath property; set the cover image via Document.Info.CoverImage or embed the image on a page before saving to EPUB.

pattern: type used in a using statement must implement 'System\.IDisposable'
fix_guidance: Replace the using statement with a regular variable declaration (or ensure the type implements IDisposable) for types like TextDevice that do not implement IDisposable.

pattern: DocumentDevice' does not contain a definition for 'BinarizeBradley'
fix_guidance: DocumentDevice is abstract and has no BinarizeBradley method; replace it with a concrete device (e.g., PngDevice) and perform binarization using System.Drawing or Aspose.Pdf's image‑processing APIs instead of calling BinarizeBradley on DocumentDevice.

pattern: 'Page' does not contain a definition for 'BackgroundColor'
fix_guidance: Remove the use of Page.BackgroundColor or replace it with a supported approach (e.g., draw a colored rectangle) because the Page class in Aspose.Pdf does not expose a BackgroundColor property.

pattern: No overload for 'GetHocrCallback' matches delegate 'Document\.CallBackGetHocrWithPage'
fix_guidance: Make the GetHocrCallback method signature match the Document.CallBackGetHocrWithPage delegate (e.g., accept an int pageNumber parameter and return a string) or change the delegate to the signature you need.

pattern: Cannot implicitly convert type 'string' to 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Text\.TextFragment'
fix_guidance: Replace the string assignment with a TextFragment, e.g., tocPage.TocInfo.Title = new TextFragment("Your Title");

pattern: Argument 1: cannot convert from 'string' to 'System\.IO\.Stream'
fix_guidance: Pass a Stream (e.g., FileStream) instead of a file path string to methods that expect a System.IO.Stream.

pattern: Document' does not contain a definition for 'AddJavaScript'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent AddJavaScript call with an appropriate action, e.g., set doc.OpenAction = new JavascriptAction(js) and add `using Aspose.Pdf.Annotations;`.

pattern: HtmlSaveOptions' does not contain a definition for 'ProgressEventType'
fix_guidance: Remove references to HtmlSaveOptions.ProgressEventType and CustomProgressHandler; the current Aspose.PDF for .NET version does not expose progress events—use a wrapper like PdfConverter for manual progress reporting or upgrade to a version that supports it.

pattern: Document.*FormPresentationMode
fix_guidance: Remove or replace the FormPresentationMode property usage; it was removed in newer Aspose.PDF versions. Use the appropriate API for form handling or omit the setting.

pattern: Cannot implicitly convert type 'object' to 'string'
fix_guidance: Cast the object to string (e.g., (string)obj) or call ToString() after checking for null before assigning to a string variable.

pattern: Argument 1: cannot convert from 'string' to 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Document\[\]'
fix_guidance: Create Aspose.Pdf.Document instances from the file paths (e.g., new Document(path)) and pass those Document objects to the Merge method instead of raw strings.

pattern: Argument 3: cannot convert from 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Color' to 'System\.Drawing\.Color'
fix_guidance: Pass a System.Drawing.Color (e.g., System.Drawing.Color.Blue) to the method or convert the Aspose.Pdf.Color using its ToSystemDrawingColor() helper before calling.

pattern: Document' does not contain a definition for 'Portfolio'
fix_guidance: Use the Document.Collection property with FileSpecification objects to build a PDF portfolio instead of the removed Document.Portfolio API.

pattern: TextBoxField' does not contain a constructor that takes 3 arguments
fix_guidance: Create the TextBoxField using the (page, rectangle) constructor only, then set its name via the PartialName property; for JavaScript calculations assign the script to sumField.Actions.OnCalculate instead of using a non‑existent Annotation property.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'SignatureField' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf.Forms assembly (e.g., install the Aspose.Pdf package that includes Forms) and include `using Aspose.Pdf.Forms;` at the top of the file.

pattern: Color' is an ambiguous reference between 'System\.Drawing\.Color' and 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Color'
fix_guidance: Disambiguate the type by using a fully‑qualified name (e.g., System.Drawing.Color.Black) or create an alias for one of the namespaces.

pattern: Rectangle' does not contain a definition for 'GraphInfo'
fix_guidance: Replace Aspose.Pdf.Rectangle with Aspose.Pdf.Drawing.Rectangle (or add a using for Aspose.Pdf.Drawing) because GraphInfo is a member of the drawing rectangle class.

pattern: ListBoxField' does not contain a definition for 'AddItem'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent AddItem call with the correct method (e.g., AddOption or Items.Add) provided by the Aspose.PDF ListBoxField API, and ensure the appropriate namespace is imported.

pattern: HeaderFooter' does not contain a definition for 'Footer'
fix_guidance: Create a HeaderFooter object and assign it directly to page.Footer (e.g., page.Footer = new HeaderFooter();). Do not try to access a non‑existent Footer property on HeaderFooter, and ensure Aspose.Pdf.Text is imported for TextFragment usage.

pattern: foreach statement cannot operate on variables of type 'DocumentActionCollection'
fix_guidance: Replace the foreach over doc.Actions with a for‑loop (using doc.Actions.Count and index) or copy the actions to a List before iterating, because DocumentActionCollection does not implement IEnumerable.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'TextFragmentArtifact' could not be found
fix_guidance: Reference the correct Aspose.Pdf assembly and replace 'TextFragmentArtifact' with the appropriate class (e.g., PageNumberStamp) from the Aspose.Pdf namespace.

pattern: PdfFileSignature' does not contain a definition for 'SetSignatureAppearance'
fix_guidance: Replace the removed SetSignatureAppearance call with the PdfFileSignature.Sign method (or appropriate overload) after creating a SignatureField; the API now uses PdfFileSignature.Sign to apply appearance and signing.

pattern: Cannot implicitly convert type 'double\[\]' to 'string'
fix_guidance: Assign a space‑separated string (e.g., "100 200 150") to the Table.ColumnWidths property instead of a double array.

pattern: An object reference is required for the non-static field, method, or property 'DocumentFactory\.CreateDocument\(string\)'
fix_guidance: Instantiate DocumentFactory (e.g., var factory = new DocumentFactory(); var doc = factory.CreateDocument(path);) or use the Document constructor directly (new Document(path)).

pattern: HiddenDataSanitizationOptions' does not contain a definition for 'DeleteEmbedded(JavaScriptActions|Files)'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent properties with the current API: use HiddenDataSanitizationOptions.RemoveJavaScriptsAndActions and delete embedded files via doc.EmbeddedFiles.Delete() before calling HiddenDataSanitizer.Sanitize.

pattern: OptimizationOptions.*RemoveSearchIndexAndPrivateInfo
fix_guidance: The 'RemoveSearchIndexAndPrivateInfo' property was removed in recent Aspose.Pdf versions; use the 'RemovePrivateInfo' flag (and optionally call doc.RemoveMetadata()) instead, or upgrade to a version that provides the dedicated method.

pattern: Document' does not contain a definition for 'CompressImages'
fix_guidance: Replace the obsolete CompressImages call with Document.OptimizeResources() (or use ImageCompressionOptions via the OptimizeResources overload) and remove the Aspose.Pdf.Optimization namespace if not needed.

pattern: ImageSaveOptions|SaveFormat\.Png
fix_guidance: Add a reference to Aspose.Pdf.Devices (using Aspose.Pdf.Devices;) and replace ImageSaveOptions/SaveFormat.Png with a PngDevice (e.g., new PngDevice(new Resolution(300))) to export pages as PNG.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'HiddenData' does not exist in the namespace 'Aspose\.Pdf'
fix_guidance: Remove the 'using Aspose.Pdf.HiddenData;' directive and import the correct namespace (e.g., Aspose.Pdf.Devices) that contains the classes you need.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'FlattenSettings' could not be found
fix_guidance: FlattenSettings was removed from recent Aspose.PDF versions; replace its usage with Document.Flatten() (or add a reference to the correct Aspose.PDF assembly and namespace if you need the older API).

pattern: CrashReportOptions' does not contain a definition for 'OutputPath'
fix_guidance: Instantiate CrashReportOptions with the exception (new CrashReportOptions(ex)) and set the CrashReportDirectory and CrashReportFilename properties instead of using a non‑existent OutputPath property.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'XYZExplicitDestination' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf.Annotations namespace (e.g., `using Aspose.Pdf.Annotations;`) and use the XYZExplicitDestination overload that accepts a page number (e.g., `new XYZExplicitDestination(page.Number, ...)`).

pattern: Document' does not contain a definition for 'AcroForm'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent 'AcroForm' member with the correct API, e.g., use 'doc.Form' (or the appropriate AcroForm class from Aspose.Pdf.Facades) and ensure the required Aspose.Pdf version/reference is added.

pattern: ComparisonOptions' does not contain a definition for '(StartPage|EndPage)'
fix_guidance: Remove the StartPage/EndPage assignments; instead iterate over the desired page range manually and call TextPdfComparer.ComparePages for each page.

pattern: ComparisonOptions' does not contain a definition for 'IgnoreCase'
fix_guidance: Remove the nonexistent IgnoreCase property; Aspose.Pdf.Comparison.ComparisonOptions has no case‑insensitivity flag, so preprocess text to a uniform case or implement custom diff logic before calling the comparer.

pattern: ComparisonOptions.*ComparisonFlags
fix_guidance: Remove references to the non‑existent ComparisonFlags member; use the appropriate ComparisonOptions properties (e.g., IncludeFormFields, EditOperationsOrder) instead.

pattern: ComparisonOptions' does not contain a definition for '(CompareMode|IgnoreImages)'
fix_guidance: Delete the assignments to CompareMode and IgnoreImages – these members were removed from the current Aspose.PDF API; the default ComparisonOptions already performs text comparison and ignores image differences.

pattern: Cannot declare a variable of static type 'SideBySidePdfComparer'
fix_guidance: Do not instantiate the static SideBySidePdfComparer; instead call its static methods directly or switch to a non‑static comparer like TextPdfComparer as shown in the fix.

pattern: The annotation for nullable reference types should only be used in code within a '#nullable' annotations context
fix_guidance: Wrap the code with a '#nullable enable' directive or remove the nullable annotation if you don't intend to use nullable reference types.

pattern: Cannot implicitly convert type 'string' to 'int'
fix_guidance: Make the target variable an int by parsing the string (e.g., int.Parse(value)) or change the variable's type to string so the assigned value matches the variable type.

pattern: Form\.Form\(string, string\) is obsolete
fix_guidance: Replace the obsolete Form(pdfTemplatePath, outputPdfPath) with the non‑obsolete Form(pdfTemplatePath) constructor and call form.Save(outputPdfPath) instead of the parameterless Save().

pattern: Field' does not contain a definition for 'FieldType'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent Field.FieldType usage with a valid approach, such as retrieving the runtime type name (field.GetType().Name) or casting to the specific derived field class that provides a Type property, and ensure the Aspose.Pdf.Forms namespace is referenced if needed.

pattern: Program does not contain a static 'Main' method suitable for an entry point
fix_guidance: Add a static Main method (e.g., `public static void Main(string[] args)`) to a class, or change the project output type to a class library if no executable is needed.

pattern: Form' does not contain a definition for 'FieldNames'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent FieldNames property with doc.Form?.Fields?.Select(f => f.Name).ToArray() and add a using System.Linq; directive.

pattern: Form' does not contain a definition for 'ExportFormFieldsToJson'
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf.Facades assembly and include `using Aspose.Pdf.Facades;` so the `ExportFormFieldsToJson` extension method becomes available.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'FormImportResult' could not be found
fix_guidance: Reference the Aspose.Pdf assembly and add `using Aspose.Pdf.Facades;` (or switch to the newer API that uses generic Exception handling instead of FormImportResult).

pattern: Cannot implicitly convert type 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Facades\.FieldType' to 'string'
fix_guidance: Call .ToString() on the FieldType enum (or change the variable type to FieldType) before assigning it to a string variable.

pattern: PdfAnnotationEditor' does not contain a definition for 'OverwriteAnnotations'
fix_guidance: Remove the OverwriteAnnotations property and call ImportAnnotations with the overload that accepts an AnnotationType[] (e.g., editor.ImportAnnotations(paths, null)). Add `using Aspose.Pdf.Annotations;` if the AnnotationType enum is needed.

pattern: MarkupAnnotation' does not contain a definition for 'Open'
fix_guidance: Cast the annotation to a concrete type that supports the Open property (e.g., TextAnnotation or PopupAnnotation) before setting it, and ensure the appropriate Aspose.Pdf.Annotations namespace is referenced.

pattern: PdfAnnotationEditor' does not contain a definition for 'FlattenAnnotations'
fix_guidance: The 'FlattenAnnotations' method is not available in the current Aspose.PDF version; remove the call or replace it with the appropriate API (e.g., use PdfEditor.Flatten or DeleteAnnotations) and ensure the correct Aspose.PDF package version is referenced.

pattern: Annotation' does not contain a definition for 'Author'
fix_guidance: Cast the annotation to a MarkupAnnotation and use its Subject property (e.g., ((MarkupAnnotation)annotation).Subject) instead of the non‑existent Author property.

pattern: Annotation.*does not contain a definition for 'Author'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent Author property with the Subject property (or another appropriate field) on Annotation objects, or reference a newer Aspose.PDF version that exposes Author.

pattern: Path' is an ambiguous reference between 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Drawing\.Path' and 'System\.IO\.Path'
fix_guidance: Disambiguate the reference by using a fully qualified name (e.g., System.IO.Path) or create a namespace alias for one of the types.

pattern: Document' does not contain a definition for 'FlattenAnnotations'
fix_guidance: Use the PdfAnnotationEditor facade (Aspose.Pdf.Facades) and call its FlatteningAnnotations method after binding the Document, instead of calling FlattenAnnotations on Document.

pattern: Argument \d+: cannot convert from 'double' to 'float'
fix_guidance: Provide float arguments (e.g., use an 'F' suffix or cast to float) or switch to the double-based API overload as the constructor now expects double values.

pattern: 'MarkupAnnotation' does not contain a definition for 'ModifiedDate'
fix_guidance: Replace the non‑existent ModifiedDate property with the correct MarkupAnnotation.Modified property (or appropriate API version property) and ensure the proper Aspose.Pdf namespace is referenced.

pattern: Program does not contain a static 'Main' method
fix_guidance: Add a static Main method (e.g., `static void Main(string[] args)`) or change the project output type to a class library if an executable entry point is not needed.

pattern: DocumentInfo' does not contain a definition for 'AdditionalInfo'
fix_guidance: Remove the use of DocumentInfo.AdditionalInfo and use a supported property such as DocumentInfo.ModDate or add custom metadata via Document.SetCatalogValue.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'Azure' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Azure.Storage.Blobs NuGet package (and any other Azure SDK packages you use) and ensure the appropriate using directives are present.

pattern: Unexpected character '\\'
fix_guidance: Remove the escaped '\n' sequences from the source file and place each statement (e.g., using directives) on its own line so the code contains real line breaks, not literal backslashes.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'Outline' does not exist in the namespace 'Aspose\.Pdf'
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf assembly that contains the Outline class and include the appropriate using directive (e.g., `using Aspose.Pdf.Outline;`).

pattern: Argument 1: cannot convert from 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Facades\.Bookmarks?' to 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Facades\.Bookmark|Aspose\.Pdf\.OutlineItemCollection'
fix_guidance: Pass a single Bookmark object (or the correct OutlineItemCollection) to the method instead of a Bookmarks collection; use the appropriate overload or iterate the collection and add each Bookmark individually.

pattern: CS1002: ; expected
fix_guidance: Add the missing opening brace after the class declaration (e.g., `class Program {`) and ensure all statements end with a semicolon.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'OutlineItem' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf assembly that contains OutlineItem and include the appropriate using directive (e.g., using Aspose.Pdf.Facades;).

pattern: Argument 2: cannot convert from 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Color' to 'System\.Drawing\.Color'
fix_guidance: Replace the Aspose.Pdf.Color argument with a System.Drawing.Color value (e.g., System.Drawing.Color.Red) or convert the color to the required type.

pattern: Cannot implicitly convert type 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Facades\.Bookmarks' to 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Facades\.Bookmark\[\]'
fix_guidance: Change the variable type to `Bookmarks` (or call `.ToArray()` on the returned collection) because `ExtractBookmarks()` returns a `Bookmarks` collection, not a `Bookmark[]` array.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'Outline' does not exist in the namespace 'Aspose.Pdf'
fix_guidance: Remove the nonexistent 'Aspose.Pdf.Outline' reference and use the Document.Outlines collection (e.g., Document doc = new Document(...); var outlines = doc.Outlines;) ensuring the Aspose.Pdf assembly is referenced.

pattern: Document' does not contain a definition for 'FontSubstitutionSettings'
fix_guidance: Replace the obsolete FontSubstitutionSettings API with FontRepository.Substitutions.Add(new SimpleFontSubstitution("MissingFont", "Arial")); and add the required using Aspose.Pdf.Devices; directive.

pattern: Resolution could not be found
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf.Facades assembly and include `using Aspose.Pdf.Facades;` (or fully qualify) so the `Resolution` type is available.

pattern: Document' does not contain a definition for 'Fonts'
fix_guidance: Replace usage of pdfDocument.Fonts with FontRepository.Substitutions (e.g., FontRepository.Substitutions.Add(new SimpleFontSubstitution("MissingFont", "Arial"))).

pattern: The name 'ImageCompressionType' does not exist in the current context
fix_guidance: Add the appropriate Aspose.Pdf namespace (e.g., `using Aspose.Pdf.Devices;`) or fully qualify the enum name to resolve the missing `ImageCompressionType` identifier.

pattern: The name 'FontSubstitution' does not exist in the current context
fix_guidance: Add the correct namespace (e.g., `using Aspose.Pdf.Text;`) and replace `FontSubstitution` with the current API call such as `FontRepository.Substitutions.Add(new SimpleFontSubstitution(...))`.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'CoordinateType' does not exist in the namespace 'Aspose\.Pdf'
fix_guidance: Replace Aspose.Pdf.Devices.CoordinateType with the correct enum PageCoordinateType (or add the appropriate using directive) to reference the enum defined in Aspose.Pdf.

pattern: Argument 1: cannot convert from 'Aspose\.Pdf\.ImageStamp' to 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Facades\.Stamp'
fix_guidance: Use the ImageStamp class from Aspose.Pdf.Drawing and add it to pages via Document/Page.AddStamp instead of passing it to PdfFileStamp which expects a Facades.Stamp.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'AspNetCore' does not exist in the namespace 'Microsoft'
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the ASP.NET Core libraries (e.g., install the Microsoft.AspNetCore.App or Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc NuGet package) and include the appropriate using directives.

pattern: PdfFileEditor.*must implement System\.IDisposable
fix_guidance: Remove the using statement or wrap the PdfFileEditor instance in a try/finally, because PdfFileEditor does not implement IDisposable.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'JavaScriptAction' could not be found
fix_guidance: Replace 'JavaScriptAction' with the correct class name 'JavascriptAction' (note the lowercase 's') and ensure the Aspose.Pdf.Annotations namespace is imported.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'PushButtonField' could not be found
fix_guidance: Replace 'PushButtonField' with the correct Aspose.Pdf.Forms class (e.g., 'ButtonField') and ensure the appropriate using directive (Aspose.Pdf.Forms) is included.

pattern: PdfExtractor' does not contain a definition for 'ExtractPage'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent ExtractPage property with the StartPage and EndPage properties (e.g., extractor.StartPage = 2; extractor.EndPage = 2;) to specify the page range.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'TiffSettings' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf.Devices namespace (e.g., `using Aspose.Pdf.Devices;`) and ensure the Aspose.Pdf library version that includes `TiffSettings` is referenced.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'PdfPrintDocument' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf assembly and import the correct namespace (e.g., Aspose.Pdf.Printing), then replace the nonexistent PdfPrintDocument with the supported PdfViewer.PrintDocuments method.

pattern: SquareAnnotation' does not contain a definition for 'Action'
fix_guidance: Upgrade to a newer Aspose.PDF for .NET version that exposes the Action property on annotations (or use the base Annotation.Action property) and ensure the Aspose.Pdf.Annotations namespace is referenced.

pattern: DocumentPrivilege' does not contain a constructor that takes 0 arguments
fix_guidance: Replace the parameterless DocumentPrivilege constructor with the provided static preset (e.g., DocumentPrivilege.All) or use the Permissions enum when calling Document.Encrypt, as DocumentPrivilege has no public constructors.

pattern: Cannot implicitly convert type 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Annotations\.WidgetAnnotation' to 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Forms\.Field'
fix_guidance: Cast the returned WidgetAnnotation to Field (e.g., `Field totalField = (Field)doc.Form["Total"];` or use `as Field` with a null check).

pattern: Argument 1: cannot convert from 'string' to 'System.IO.Stream'
fix_guidance: Pass a Stream (e.g., FileStream or MemoryStream) to the method instead of a file‑path string; wrap the path in a using(FileStream fs = new FileStream(path, FileMode.Create)) and call the API with fs.

pattern: FileSpecification' does not contain a definition for 'File'
fix_guidance: Use the FileSpecification constructor that accepts the file path and description (e.g., new FileSpecification(path, description)) and, if needed, set MimeType only on library versions that expose the property.

pattern: EmbeddedFileCollection' does not contain a definition for 'Names'
fix_guidance: Iterate the EmbeddedFileCollection using its 1‑based index (for i = 1; i <= embedded.Count; i++) and retrieve each file's name via embedded[i].Name instead of using a non‑existent Names property.

pattern: Argument 1: cannot convert from 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Document' to 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Page'
fix_guidance: Pass a Page instance (e.g., doc.Pages[pageNumber]) to the SquareAnnotation constructor instead of the Document object.

pattern: TextAbsorber' does not contain a definition for 'TextFragments'
fix_guidance: Use TextFragmentAbsorber instead of TextAbsorber to access the TextFragments collection (e.g., var absorber = new TextFragmentAbsorber();).

pattern: Argument 1: cannot convert from 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Devices\.Resolution' to 'Aspose\.Pdf\.PageSize'
fix_guidance: Pass a PageSize value where a PageSize is expected and pass a Resolution object where a Resolution is required; e.g., use new BmpDevice(new Resolution(300)) instead of swapping arguments.

pattern: The type or namespace name '(PrintDuplex|PdfViewer)' does not exist in the namespace 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Printing'
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf.Printing assembly (e.g., install the Aspose.Pdf.Printing NuGet package) and include the appropriate using directive.

pattern: Cannot implicitly convert type 'float' to 'int'
fix_guidance: Explicitly cast or convert the float to an int (e.g., (int)Math.Round(value) or (int)value) before assigning it.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'Actions' does not exist in the namespace 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Annotations'
fix_guidance: Replace the obsolete Aspose.Pdf.Annotations namespace with the correct one (e.g., Aspose.Pdf.Facades) and use the appropriate classes for JavaScript actions.

pattern: ButtonField' does not contain a definition for 'Caption'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent 'Caption' property with the correct 'AlternateCaption' property on ButtonField.

pattern: PdfExtractor.*does not contain a definition for 'SetExtractImagePageRange'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent SetExtractImagePageRange call with the supported page‑range properties (e.g., set extractor.StartPage and extractor.EndPage, or use extractor.ExtractPageRange) before calling ExtractImage.

pattern: PdfContentEditor' does not contain a definition for 'FormFill'
fix_guidance: Use Aspose.Pdf.Document (or the Forms API) to access and fill form fields instead of calling FormFill on PdfContentEditor; add `using Aspose.Pdf.Forms;` and work with `doc.Form["fieldName"]`.

pattern: Cannot implicitly convert type 'System\.Collections\.Generic\.Dictionary<string, string>' to 'string\[\]'
fix_guidance: Change the target variable type to match the method's return type (e.g., use var or Dictionary<string,string>) and update subsequent code to work with a dictionary instead of a string array.

pattern: Document' does not contain a definition for 'Replace'
fix_guidance: Use Aspose.Pdf's TextFragmentAbsorber (add `using Aspose.Pdf.Text;`) to search and replace text, e.g., create a helper method that absorbs the old text, updates each fragment, and returns the replacement count.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'RectangleAnnotation' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf assembly and include the proper namespace (e.g., using Aspose.Pdf.Annotations;). In recent Aspose.Pdf versions the class is named SquareAnnotation and JavaScriptAction may only be available in newer releases, so either upgrade the library or replace RectangleAnnotation with SquareAnnotation and adjust the action code accordingly.

pattern: Permissions' does not contain a definition for '(ModifyContents|CopyContents|PrintHighResolution)'
fix_guidance: Replace the invalid enum members with the correct ones: use Permissions.ModifyContent, Permissions.CopyContent, and Permissions.PrintHighResolution (if supported) instead of the plural names.

pattern: Page' does not contain a definition for 'Stamps'
fix_guidance: Replace usage of Page.Stamps with page.Annotations, cast each Annotation to StampAnnotation, and add `using Aspose.Pdf.Annotations;` to access stamp properties.

pattern: FileSpecification' does not contain a definition for '(File|MimeType)'
fix_guidance: Replace the property assignments with the constructor `new FileSpecification(filePath, description)` and omit the MimeType property, as it is not available in the current Aspose.Pdf version.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'CheckBoxField' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf.Forms assembly and include `using Aspose.Pdf.Forms;` at the top of the file.

pattern: PngDevice' does not contain a definition for 'BackgroundColor'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent BackgroundColor property with the TransparentBackground property on PngDevice, or use PngSaveOptions to set BackgroundColor when saving.

pattern: Cannot implicitly convert type 'string' to 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Annotations\.BorderStyle'
fix_guidance: Use the BorderStyle enum (e.g., BorderStyle.Dashed) instead of a string, and assign a Dash object (e.g., new Dash(new int[] { 3, 2 })) to the Dash property.

pattern: TextAbsorber' does not contain a definition for 'TextFragments'|Position' does not contain a definition for 'Y'
fix_guidance: Replace TextAbsorber with TextFragmentAbsorber to access the TextFragments collection, and use the fragment's Rectangle.LLY (or other rectangle property) instead of Position.Y for baseline coordinates.

pattern: ImageStamp' does not contain a definition for 'Rotation'
fix_guidance: Replace ImageStamp with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Stamp (or use the correct class for image stamping) and set rotation on that object, e.g., stamp.Rotation = 45f after binding the image.

pattern: Duplex' does not contain a definition for 'LongEdge'
fix_guidance: Use a valid Duplex enum value (e.g., Aspose.Pdf.Printing.Duplex.Horizontal or .Vertical) instead of 'LongEdge' and reference the Aspose.Pdf.Printing namespace.

pattern: Page' does not contain a definition for 'PageDictionary'
fix_guidance: Remove references to the non‑existent PageDictionary property; use the supported Page.Dictionary or other Aspose.Pdf page APIs instead.

pattern: FileSpecification' does not contain a definition for 'EmbeddedFile'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent EmbeddedFile property with a FileSpecification constructor and add the instance to doc.EmbeddedFiles (e.g., var fs = new FileSpecification(path, description); doc.EmbeddedFiles.Add(fs);).

pattern: No overload for method 'PrintDocument' takes 1 arguments
fix_guidance: Instantiate PrintDocument using its parameterless constructor (or use the correct overload signature) and configure printer settings separately instead of passing an argument.

pattern: PdfExtractor' does not contain a definition for 'GetCurrentPageNumber'
fix_guidance: Replace the call to GetCurrentPageNumber with your own page loop using Document.Pages.Count and set PdfExtractor.StartPage/EndPage to the desired page number.

pattern: The type or namespace name '(PushButtonField|JavaScriptAction)' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf assembly and include the correct namespace (e.g., Aspose.Pdf.Annotations for PushButtonAnnotation and Aspose.Pdf.Facades for FormEditor) or replace the missing types with the supported FormEditor API.

pattern: FileSpecification' does not contain a definition for 'MimeType'
fix_guidance: Use the correct property name 'MIMEType' (capitalized) on FileSpecification, or set the MIME type via the constructor that accepts a description and file path.

pattern: Document' does not contain a definition for 'Attachments'
fix_guidance: Replace the non‑existent Attachments collection with the EmbeddedFiles collection (e.g., pdfDoc.EmbeddedFiles.Add(fileSpec)) and ensure the Aspose.Pdf namespace is referenced.

pattern: Cannot implicitly convert type 'System\.Collections\.Generic\.IList<string>' to 'System\.Collections\.IList'
fix_guidance: Declare the variable as IList<string> (or cast the value) instead of non‑generic IList to match the returned generic collection.

pattern: ViewerPreference' does not contain a definition for 'PageModeUseOutline'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent enum value with the correct ViewerPreference member (e.g., ViewerPreference.NonFullScreenPageModeUseOutlines).

pattern: SquareAnnotation.*BlendMode
fix_guidance: Remove or comment out the BlendMode assignment (or upgrade to a newer Aspose.Pdf version that adds the BlendMode property to SquareAnnotation).

pattern: Rectangle' is an ambiguous reference between 'System\.Drawing\.Rectangle' and 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Rectangle'
fix_guidance: Fully qualify the Rectangle type (e.g., System.Drawing.Rectangle) or remove the conflicting using directive to eliminate the ambiguity.

pattern: Stamp' does not contain a definition for 'Text'
fix_guidance: Replace the abstract Stamp with a concrete stamp class such as TextStamp and use its available members (e.g., TextState, RotateAngle) instead of the nonexistent Text, TextState, Rotation, SetOrigin properties.

pattern: FreeTextAnnotation' does not contain a definition for '(Open|TextState)'
fix_guidance: Remove the nonexistent Open and TextState members; instead set the annotation's appearance via a DefaultAppearance (using System.Drawing.Color) and configure visual properties like Color directly.

pattern: HighlightAnnotation' does not contain a definition for 'BorderColor'
fix_guidance: Remove the nonexistent BorderColor property; set the annotation's Color for fill and use the Border property (e.g., highlight.Border = new Border(highlight) { Width = 1 };) to define border colour and width.

pattern: Cannot implicitly convert type 'System\.Drawing\.FontStyle' to 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Text\.FontStyles'
fix_guidance: Use the Aspose.Pdf.Text.FontStyles enum (e.g., FontStyles.Bold) instead of System.Drawing.FontStyle, or cast explicitly if needed.

pattern: The type or namespace name '(ImageAnnotation|RubberStamp)' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add the correct Aspose.Pdf namespace (e.g., `using Aspose.Pdf.Annotations;`) and reference the Aspose.Pdf assembly, then replace the nonexistent types with the proper annotation classes such as `TextAnnotation` or `RubberStampAnnotation`.

pattern: .*'Color' is an ambiguous reference between 'System.Drawing.Color' and 'Aspose.Pdf.Color'.*
fix_guidance: Disambiguate the type by using a fully qualified name (e.g., System.Drawing.Color) or create an alias for one of the namespaces, and remove the conflicting using directive.

pattern: There is no argument given that corresponds to the required parameter 'fileSpec'
fix_guidance: Pass a FileSpecification instance as the third argument when constructing FileAttachmentAnnotation, e.g., new FileAttachmentAnnotation(page, rect, new FileSpecification(filePath)).

pattern: The type or namespace name 'NUnit' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the NUnit framework (e.g., install the NUnit NuGet package) and include the appropriate using directive (using NUnit.Framework;).

pattern: Argument 1: cannot convert from 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Rectangle' to 'System\.Drawing\.Rectangle'
fix_guidance: Use a System.Drawing.Rectangle for the rectangle argument and supply a colour name string (e.g., "Black") instead of an Aspose.Pdf.Color.

pattern: Argument 4: cannot convert from 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Color' to 'string'
fix_guidance: Use the overload that expects System.Drawing.Rectangle, string imagePath, and System.Drawing.Color (swap the color and imagePath arguments and pass System.Drawing.Color.Black).

pattern: PdfContentEditor' does not contain a definition for 'AddText'
fix_guidance: Replace the PdfContentEditor.AddText call with a TextFragment added to a Document (or add the appropriate Aspose.Pdf.Facades reference if using a version that provides AddText).

pattern: The type or namespace name 'Npgsql' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Npgsql library (e.g., run `dotnet add package Npgsql`) and keep the `using Npgsql;` directive.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'Azure' does not exist in the namespace 'Microsoft'
fix_guidance: Add the required Azure SDK NuGet packages (e.g., Microsoft.Azure.WebJobs, Azure.Storage.Blobs) to the project and include the appropriate using statements.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'AttachmentInfo' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add the appropriate Aspose.PDF namespace or assembly reference that defines AttachmentInfo, or use var to avoid directly referencing the type.

pattern: Cannot implicitly convert type 'System\.Collections\.Generic\.IList<string>' to 'string\[\]'
fix_guidance: Assign the result to an IList<string> variable or convert it with .ToArray() (e.g., string[] arr = extractor.GetAttachNames().ToArray()).

pattern: PdfExtractor.*ImageExtractionMode
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent 'ImageExtractionMode' member with the correct 'ExtractImageMode' property and use the 'ExtractImageMode' enum (e.g., extractor.ExtractImageMode = ExtractImageMode.DefinedInResources) and ensure the Aspose.Pdf.Facades assembly version supports it.

pattern: The name 'ExtractImageMode' does not exist in the current context
fix_guidance: Remove or replace the 'ExtractImageMode' reference; the property was removed—simply call extractor.ExtractImage() to extract all images or use the correct enum from the current Aspose.PDF version.

pattern: XImage' does not contain a definition for 'ImageInfo'
fix_guidance: Replace usage of XImage.ImageInfo (which is unavailable) with saving the image to a stream or temporary file and determine its format by inspecting the file header or using Aspose.Pdf's supported methods.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'Amazon' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the AWS SDK for .NET (e.g., install the AWSSDK.S3 NuGet package) and include the appropriate using directives such as `using Amazon.S3;`.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'DocumentFormat' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the DocumentFormat.OpenXml NuGet package (or remove the unused using statements) so the DocumentFormat namespace is available to the project.

pattern: Cannot implicitly convert type 'bool' to 'Aspose\.Pdf\.ExtractImageMode'
fix_guidance: Assign a valid ExtractImageMode enum value (e.g., ExtractImageMode.AllImages) instead of a boolean, or omit the assignment if the default mode is sufficient.

pattern: Cannot implicitly convert type 'System\.Collections\.Generic\.IList<[^>]+>' to 'System\.Collections\.IList'
fix_guidance: Declare the variable as IList<string> (or cast explicitly) and ensure System.Collections.Generic is imported.

pattern: Cannot implicitly convert type 'double' to 'float'
fix_guidance: Cast the double expression to float (e.g., (float)value) or change the target variable to double.

pattern: FontStyle' is an ambiguous reference between
fix_guidance: Fully qualify the type (e.g., System.Drawing.FontStyle) or create an alias to disambiguate the FontStyle reference.

pattern: Argument 1: cannot convert from 'Aspose\.Pdf\.XImage' to 'System\.IO\.Stream'
fix_guidance: Use the overload that accepts the image resource name (string) or an XImage, e.g., replace the call with page.AddImage(imageName, rect) after adding the image to page.Resources.Images.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'Google' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add the required Google Cloud SDK NuGet packages (e.g., Google.Cloud.Storage.V1, Google.Apis.Storage.v1) or remove the using statements if the code is not needed.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'Autofiller' could not be found
fix_guidance: Replace the misspelled 'Autofiller' with the correct class name 'AutoFiller' and ensure the proper Aspose.Pdf namespace is imported.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'Cells' does not exist in the namespace 'Aspose'
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Cells assembly (e.g., install the Aspose.Cells NuGet package) or remove the unused `using Aspose.Cells;` directive.

pattern: The type name 'OleDb\w*' could not be found in the namespace 'System\.Data\.OleDb'
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the System.Data.OleDb assembly (install the System.Data.OleDb NuGet package for .NET Core/5+) and include `using System.Data.OleDb;` in the source file.

pattern: WidgetAnnotation' does not contain a definition for 'SetValue'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent WidgetAnnotation.SetValue call with the appropriate field type (e.g., TextBoxField) and use its SetValue method, or access the form field via the Form object and set its value.

pattern: AutoFiller\.InputFileName' is obsolete
fix_guidance: Replace usage of AutoFiller.InputFileName with AutoFiller.BindPdf(inputFile) to initialize the facade.

pattern: AutoFiller\.Save\(\)'.*obsolete
fix_guidance: Replace calls to AutoFiller.Save() with the overload AutoFiller.Save(destinationPath) specifying the output folder.

pattern: The type name 'OleDbConnection' could not be found in the namespace 'System.Data.OleDb'
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the System.Data.OleDb assembly (e.g., install the System.Data.OleDb NuGet package) or replace OleDb usage with a cross‑platform alternative such as CSV parsing.

pattern: Field\[\] does not contain a definition for 'Keys'
fix_guidance: Iterate over the Field objects directly (e.g., foreach (Field field in document.Form.Fields)) and use each field's properties such as field.PartialName, instead of trying to access a non‑existent Keys collection.

pattern: Page' does not contain a definition for 'Form'
fix_guidance: Use the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form class with a Document instance (e.g., `new Form(document)`) instead of trying to access a non‑existent `Form` member on a Page, and ensure the Aspose.Pdf.Facades namespace is imported.

pattern: DocumentPrivilege' does not contain a definition for 'PrintDocument'
fix_guidance: Replace DocumentPrivilege.PrintDocument with the correct Permissions enum value (e.g., Permissions.PrintDocument) when calling Document.Encrypt.

pattern: PageCollection' does not contain a definition for 'BeforePageGenerate'
fix_guidance: Remove the nonexistent BeforePageGenerate event and instead iterate over doc.Pages, adding the header to each Page's Paragraphs collection.

pattern: The type name 'OleDbConnection' could not be found in the namespace 'System\.Data\.OleDb'
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the System.Data.OleDb assembly (e.g., via the System.Data.OleDb NuGet package) and include `using System.Data.OleDb;` in the source file.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'Form' does not exist in the namespace 'Aspose\.Pdf'
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf.Forms assembly (or NuGet package) and include `using Aspose.Pdf.Forms;` in the source file.

pattern: Stamp' is an ambiguous reference between 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Facades\.Stamp' and 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Stamp'
fix_guidance: Qualify the type with its namespace (e.g., Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Stamp) or create a using alias to resolve the ambiguity.

pattern: WidgetAnnotation.*does not contain a definition for 'SetValue'
fix_guidance: Replace the call to SetValue with the correct API – use the widget's Value property (e.g., widgetAnnotation.Value = "text") or work with the specific form field class (e.g., TextBoxField) that provides a SetValue method.

pattern: AutoFiller\.(InputFileName|Save)\(\)' is obsolete
fix_guidance: Replace the obsolete InputFileName property with BindPdf(inputFile) for initialization, and replace the obsolete Save() method with Save(destination) to specify the output file.

pattern: Cannot implicitly convert type 'float\[\]' to 'string'
fix_guidance: Convert the float array to a string (e.g., using string.Join) or change the target variable/type to float[] instead of string.

pattern: Permissions' does not contain a definition for 'ModifyContents'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent enum members with the correct Aspose.Pdf Permissions values, e.g., use Permissions.ModifyContent and Permissions.CopyContent (singular) instead of ModifyContents/CopyContents.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'TableAbsorber' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add `using Aspose.Pdf.Text;` at the top of the file and ensure the project references the Aspose.Pdf assembly version that contains the TableAbsorber class.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'AspNetCore' does not exist in the namespace 'Microsoft'|The type or namespace name 'Cells' does not exist in the namespace 'Aspose'
fix_guidance: Add the missing NuGet packages (e.g., Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc for ASP.NET Core types and Aspose.Cells for the Cells namespace) and ensure the corresponding using directives are present.

pattern: Form' does not contain a definition for 'ImportDataTable'
fix_guidance: Replace the use of 'Form' with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller (and add the appropriate using directive) to access the ImportDataTable method.

pattern: AutoFiller\.Save\(\) is obsolete
fix_guidance: Replace the parameterless Save() call with Save(destinationPath) to specify the output file.

pattern: Rectangle' is an ambiguous reference between 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Drawing\.Rectangle' and 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Rectangle'
fix_guidance: Disambiguate the type by using a fully qualified name (e.g., Aspose.Pdf.Drawing.Rectangle) or create a using alias for one of the Rectangle classes.

pattern: AutoFiller' does not contain a definition for 'FillField'
fix_guidance: Replace the use of AutoFiller with Aspose.Pdf.Document (or appropriate form class) and call the correct API (e.g., doc.Form[fieldName].SetValue or use TextBoxField), adding the necessary Aspose.Pdf.Forms using directive.

pattern: Permissions' does not contain a definition for
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent Permissions members (e.g., CopyContents, FillFormFields, Accessibility, HighQualityPrint) with valid enum values such as Permissions.PrintDocument, Permissions.ExtractContent, etc., as defined in Aspose.Pdf.Permissions.

pattern: The type name 'OleDb\w+' could not be found in the namespace 'System\.Data\.OleDb'
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the System.Data.OleDb assembly (e.g., install the System.Data.OleDb NuGet package) and ensure the using directive is present.

pattern: RadioButtonField' does not contain a constructor that takes \d+ arguments
fix_guidance: Instantiate RadioButtonField with a Page object (e.g., new RadioButtonField(page)) instead of passing the Document, and when adding the field to the form use the page index (int) with doc.Form.Add(field, pageNumber).

pattern: Cannot implicitly convert type 'string' to 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Facades\.FontStyle'
fix_guidance: Assign a FontStyle enum value (e.g., FontStyle.Bold) instead of a string, or cast/parse the string to the FontStyle enum.

pattern: WidgetAnnotation' does not contain a definition for 'AnnotationDictionary'
fix_guidance: Update to a newer Aspose.Pdf for .NET version that includes the AnnotationDictionary member, or replace the direct access with the supported FormEditor API (e.g., SetFieldAttribute) to modify widget properties.

pattern: No overload for method 'SetFieldAppearance' takes 3 arguments
fix_guidance: Call SetFieldAppearance with the correct overload (e.g., two arguments: field name and an AnnotationFlags value) or adjust the argument list to match the method signature in the Aspose.Pdf API.

pattern: Argument 1: cannot convert from 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Document' to 'string'
fix_guidance: Pass a file path (string) to the method instead of a Document object; use the overload that accepts a destination path, e.g., editor.Save(outputPath).

pattern: Form' does not contain a definition for 'GetFieldRect'
fix_guidance: Replace the obsolete Form.GetFieldRect call with the field's Rect property (e.g., doc.Form.Fields[i].Rect) and ensure you reference Aspose.Pdf.Forms.

pattern: Form' does not contain a constructor that takes 1 arguments
fix_guidance: Replace the invalid constructor call with the existing form instance from the document, e.g., use `Form form = doc.Form;` instead of `new Form(doc)`.

pattern: Border' does not contain a constructor that takes 2 arguments
fix_guidance: Use the Border property of the field (e.g., sigField.Border.Width = 2) instead of trying to instantiate Border with a constructor.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'FieldAppearance' does not exist in the namespace 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Facades'
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf.Facades assembly that contains FieldAppearance, or replace FieldAppearance with the current FormFieldFacade class and use System.Drawing.Color for color settings.

pattern: Form' is an ambiguous reference between 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Facades\.Form' and 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Forms\.Form'
fix_guidance: Remove the conflicting using directive (e.g., Aspose.Pdf.Facades) or fully qualify the Form class to eliminate the ambiguity.

pattern: Form does not contain a definition for 'ExportFormFieldsToJson'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent ExportFormFieldsToJson call with the correct ExportToJson method on the Form object (e.g., doc.Form.ExportToJson(stream)) and ensure the appropriate Aspose.Pdf namespace is referenced.

pattern: FormEditor\.FormEditor\(string, string\) is obsolete
fix_guidance: Replace the obsolete FormEditor(string, string) constructor with the non‑obsolete overload (e.g., FormEditor(Document) or the parameter‑less constructor) after loading the PDF document, then save the changes.

pattern: FieldType.*does not contain a definition for 'Button'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent FieldType.Button with the correct enum value FieldType.PushButton (and ensure rectangle coordinates are passed as floats).

pattern: The type or namespace name 'JavaScriptAction' does not exist in the namespace 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Annotations'
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf.Annotations assembly (or upgrade to a version that includes JavaScriptAction), or remove the using/usage of JavaScriptAction if it is not required.

pattern: WidgetAnnotation' does not contain a definition for 'Value'
fix_guidance: Use the appropriate form field type (e.g., TextBoxField) or the Field object from Document.Form.Fields, which exposes the Value property, instead of accessing Value on WidgetAnnotation.

pattern: PKCS1' does not contain a definition for 'Contact'
fix_guidance: Replace the use of the PKCS1 class with the PKCS7 class (or the correct signature class) that provides a Contact property, and ensure the appropriate Aspose.Pdf namespace is imported.

pattern: Form\.(Form\(string, string\)|Save\(\))' is obsolete
fix_guidance: Replace the obsolete Form(string, string) constructor with the parameterless Form(inputPath) and use form.Save(outputPath) instead of the parameterless Save() method.

pattern: FormFieldFacade does not contain a definition for 'AlignmentEnum'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent AlignmentEnum with the provided constant, e.g., set `formEditor.Facade.Alignment = FormFieldFacade.AlignCenter;`.

pattern: WidgetAnnotation' does not contain a definition for 'PageNumber'
fix_guidance: WidgetAnnotation has no PageNumber property; instead assign the widget to a specific page by adding it to that page's Annotations collection or set its Rect on the target page.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'Actions' does not exist in the namespace 'Aspose\.Pdf'
fix_guidance: Reference the correct Aspose.Pdf namespace (e.g., use Aspose.Pdf.Facades) and ensure the Aspose.Pdf assembly is added to the project.

pattern: ListBoxField' does not contain a definition for '(BackgroundColor|BorderColor|TextColor)'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent BackgroundColor, BorderColor, and TextColor properties with the supported ListBoxField properties such as Color for fill/background and Border (or Border.Width) for border styling, and ensure you reference Aspose.Pdf.Forms.

pattern: Form' is an ambiguous reference between
fix_guidance: Disambiguate the 'Form' type by using a namespace alias or fully qualifying the class (e.g., Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form or Aspose.Pdf.Forms.Form) in your code.

pattern: Form' does not contain a definition for 'AddTextBox'
fix_guidance: Add a reference to Aspose.Pdf.Forms, create a TextBoxField (e.g., new TextBoxField(doc.Pages[1], rect)) and add it via doc.Form.Add; do not use Form.AddTextBox or FieldFlag.

pattern: SignatureField' does not contain a definition for 'CustomAppearance'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent CustomAppearance property with the correct API (e.g., set sigField.SignatureAppearance = new SignatureCustomAppearance()) and ensure you reference the appropriate Aspose.Pdf namespace.
